mapper.select: SELECT CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM, CL.CLASS_STAT_CD, CL.ENRL_STRT_YMD, CL.ENRL_END_YMD, CO.COURSE_NM, CO.INSTR_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, NVL(SC.STUDENT_CNT, 0) AS STUDENT_CNT, LC.LECTURE_CNT, CASE WHEN NVL(SC.STUDENT_CNT, 0) = 0 OR LC.LECTURE_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(LP_DONE.DONE_CNT, 0) * 100.0 / (SC.STUDENT_CNT * LC.LECTURE_CNT) , 1) END AS AVG_PROGRESS_RATE FROM CLASSROOM CL INNER JOIN COURSE CO ON CO.COURSE_SN = CL.COURSE_SN INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_ID = CO.INSTR_USER_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_SN, COUNT(*) AS LECTURE_CNT FROM LECTURE GROUP BY COURSE_SN ) LC ON LC.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY CLASS_SN ) SC ON SC.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LP.COURSE_SN, CM.CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS DONE_CNT FROM LECTURE_PROGRESS LP INNER JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER CM ON CM.USER_ID = LP.USER_ID AND CM.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE LP.SECONDS_WATCHED > 0 GROUP BY LP.COURSE_SN, CM.CLASS_SN ) LP_DONE ON LP_DONE.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN AND LP_DONE.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN ORDER BY CL.CLASS_SN

SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(LP.LAST_UPDATE, 'MM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS MON, CL.CLASS_NM, ROUND( COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SC.STUDENT_CNT * LC.LECTURE_CNT, 0) , 1) AS PROGRESS_RATE FROM LECTURE_PROGRESS LP JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER CM ON CM.USER_ID = LP.USER_ID AND CM.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = CM.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE CO ON CO.COURSE_SN = CL.COURSE_SN JOIN ( SELECT CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY CLASS_SN ) SC ON SC.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_SN, COUNT(*) AS LECTURE_CNT FROM LECTURE GROUP BY COURSE_SN ) LC ON LC.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN WHERE LP.SECONDS_WATCHED > 0 AND LP.LAST_UPDATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) GROUP BY TRUNC(LP.LAST_UPDATE, 'MM'), CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM, SC.STUDENT_CNT, LC.LECTURE_CNT ORDER BY TRUNC(LP.LAST_UPDATE, 'MM'), CL.CLASS_SN

SELECT E.EXAM_SN, E.EXAM_REG_NM, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_STRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS EXAM_STRT_DT, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS EXAM_END_DT, CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM, NVL(SC.STUDENT_CNT, 0) AS TARGET_CNT FROM EXAM E JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY CLASS_SN ) SC ON SC.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN WHERE E.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' AND E.EXAM_END_DT > SYSDATE ORDER BY E.EXAM_STRT_DT ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT E.EXAM_SN, E.EXAM_REG_NM, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXAM_END_DT, CL.CLASS_NM, COUNT(ET.STD_USER_ID) AS TAKER_CNT, ROUND(AVG(ET.TOT_SCORE), 1) AS AVG_SCORE FROM EXAM E JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN JOIN EXAM_TAKER ET ON ET.EXAM_SN = E.EXAM_SN WHERE E.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' AND E.EXAM_END_DT <= SYSDATE AND ET.TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY E.EXAM_SN, E.EXAM_REG_NM, E.EXAM_END_DT, CL.CLASS_NM ORDER BY E.EXAM_END_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM, COUNT(ET.STD_USER_ID) AS TAKER_CNT, ROUND(AVG(ET.TOT_SCORE), 1) AS AVG_SCORE, MAX(ET.TOT_SCORE) AS MAX_SCORE, MIN(ET.TOT_SCORE) AS MIN_SCORE, SUM(CASE WHEN ET.TOT_SCORE >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_90_PLUS, SUM(CASE WHEN ET.TOT_SCORE < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BELOW_60 FROM EXAM E JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN JOIN EXAM_TAKER ET ON ET.EXAM_SN = E.EXAM_SN WHERE E.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' AND ET.TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM ORDER BY AVG_SCORE DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_0_39, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 40 AND TOT_SCORE < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_40_49, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 50 AND TOT_SCORE < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_50_59, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 60 AND TOT_SCORE < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_60_69, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 70 AND TOT_SCORE < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_70_79, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 80 AND TOT_SCORE < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_80_89, SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCORE >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_90_100 FROM EXAM_TAKER WHERE TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL
